name: Stately Coconut Layer Cake
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees. Cream shortening and sugar until light and fluffy using an electric mixer on medium speed. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. In a separate bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt. Alternately add this mixture and milk to the creamed mixture, beginning and ending with the dry ingredients. Mix thoroughly after each addition. Stir in almond extract and vanilla extract. Divide batter evenly among three greased and floured 9-inch round cake pans. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Allow cakes to cool in pans for 10 minutes before removing them and placing on wire racks to cool completely. Assemble layers by spreading lemon-orange filling between them, then top and sides with boiled frosting. Sprinkle with fresh grated coconut.
